claim_boundary: CAD-derived mold-flow input deck for toolmaker/simulation setup. This is not a returned Moldflow/SolidWorks Plastics result.

material_request.family: PC+ABS or glass-filled PC/ABS, molded orange
required_supplier_data: shrink tensor or isotropic shrink table

nominal_process_window.material_family: PC+ABS or glass-filled PC/ABS, molded orange
nominal_process_window.drying: Dry PC+ABS per resin datasheet before molding; record dryer dew point and residence time.
nominal_process_window.pack_hold: Start with 95-99% fill transfer, stepped pack/hold DOE, and gate-freeze study.
nominal_process_window.venting: Modeled vents at end-of-fill corners, camera/window, USB saddle, acoustic ports, and snap-hook roots; toolmaker must tune vent depth/land to resin and flash limits.
cosmetic_controls: Orange color plaque approval before tool texture freeze.
Gate vestige and blush review on first shots under production lighting.
Texture-depth/draft review before any hard-tool steel commitment.

injection_strategy.primary: two submarine gates into back cover long edge, fan gate alternate for color consistency
injection_strategy.alternate_to_quote: single fan gate into non-cosmetic back-shell edge if dual submarine gates create orange streak/blush or unbalanced fill

critical_air_trap_regions: end-of-fill top and bottom shell corners
USB-C saddle and bottom acoustic apertures

cosmetic_keepout_surfaces: front orange rail around bonded black glass
USB-C lip and bottom port field
side button caps and side rail
